name: SE Ranking
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What SE Ranking Does

SE Ranking is an all‑in‑one SEO platform that includes a keyword rank tracker alongside tools for keyword research, competitor analysis, site audit, and backlink monitoring. The rank tracker monitors keyword positions in any location, search engine, and device, and promises 100% accuracy. This versatility makes SE Ranking appealing for agencies that want an affordable toolkit.

Key Features

  • Accurate rank tracking across Google, Bing, Yahoo, and YouTube. 
  • Intuitive competitor monitoring with visibility ranking and share of voice insights.
  • SERP analysis of the top 100 search results for any keyword.
  • Easy on‑page SEO audits.
  • Backlink & keyword research.
  • AI results tracker functionality to analyze brand visibility across AI search engines.

Benefits of SE Ranking

  • SE Ranking offers lower entry pricing than many enterprise tools.
  • All-in-one features reduce integration overhead and subscription sprawl.
  • Track keywords across multiple search engines and devices to ensure that your strategy accounts for varied user behaviors.
  • Combines rank tracking with SERP analysis and on‑page audits.

Pricing

  • Essential plan: ~$65/month (includes rank tracking for a smaller number of keywords).
  • Pro plan: ~$119/month (adds more keywords, competitor monitoring, and project limits).
  • Business plan: ~$259/month (scaled limits and API access). 

Discounts are available with annual subscriptions, and you can choose to upgrade with Agency, Content Marketing, and Local Marketing add-ons.

Pros

  • Precise keyword tracking for multiple search engines and devices.
  • Robust competitor and SERP analysis features.
  • Integrated SEO tools (site audit, backlink checker, keyword research).

Cons

  • Some users have reported occasional bugs and slow support response. Some reviews mention that account changes can be difficult.
  • Interface can feel cluttered when working with many tools; new users may need time to navigate all features.

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“We at Honey Whale have been using SE Ranking daily, and it's been nothing short of fantastic. As an agency, finding a tool that balances cost-effectiveness with high functionality is crucial, and SE Ranking does just that. It stands toe-to-toe with more expensive options like SEMrush and Ahrefs, offering almost identical features at a more accessible price point.”

— Review collected by and hosted on G2.com
